message:
test(ui): add structured test logging across UI module tests

Adds consistent test lifecycle logging to UI module tests for better
debugging and CI visibility, following the project's test logging
convention established in other crates.

Changes across all UI submodules:
- context.rs: Add log_test_start() helper and info! logging
- markdown.rs: Add test name logging at start
- progress.rs: Add test lifecycle logging
- styled.rs: Add test start/pass logging
- test_utils.rs: Add test instrumentation
- theme.rs: Add test logging

Test logging pattern:
  info!("TEST START: test_function_name");
  // ... test assertions ...
  info!("TEST PASS: test_function_name");

Benefits:
- Clear test boundaries in cargo test --nocapture output
- Easier debugging when tests fail in CI
- Consistent with rch-telemetry and rch-common test patterns
- Helps identify slow or hanging tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
